attributes.description: Query volume, latency, success/failure, and top indices from Elasticsearch query logs.

embeddableConfig.content:
### Elasticsearch query analytics
Analyze all your historical Elasticsearch queries (ES|QL, DSL, SQL, EQL) and how they perform in one place. [Learn more about query logs](https://www.elastic.co/docs/deploy-manage/monitor/logging-configuration/query-logs)
If you want to inspect in-flight queries, head over to [Query activity](/app/management/clusterPerformance/queryActivity).

attributes.title: Latency (avg, p50, p95, p99) over time
